task_completion.description: Create the title page (Page 1) with the required title and subtitles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page in the ActivInspire canvas displaying the text 'Math Review Jeopardy' along with the categories 'Fractions', 'Decimals', and 'Percentages'.

task_completion.description: Construct the game board grid (Page 2) with 9 colored rectangles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page in the ActivInspire canvas containing a 3x3 grid made of at least 9 colored rectangle shapes.

task_completion.description: Add category and point value labels to the game board (Page 2).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels on or around the 3x3 grid: columns labeled 'Fractions', 'Decimals', and 'Percentages', and rows labeled '100', '200', and '300'.
Look for a page in the ActivInspire canvas displaying the text 'What is 3/4 + 1/2?'.

task_completion.description: Create the Answer page (Page 4) with the correct result.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page in the ActivInspire canvas displaying the text '1 1/4' or '5/4'.

task_completion.description: Save the flipchart with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog saving the file as 'math_review_jeopardy.flipchart' in the Documents/Flipcharts directory, or the ActivInspire window title bar displaying 'math_review_jeopardy.flipchart'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent clicking tools, typing text, and drawing shapes within the ActivInspire application, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to generate the file.

integrity.description: The content was created on the actual presentation canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the text and rectangles are placed on the white ActivInspire slide canvas, not just typed into a text editor or a separate notes application.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the pages and content rather than opening a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a progression of screenshots showing the step-by-step addition of pages, text, and shapes over time.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart saved as 'math_review_jeopardy.flipchart' in /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/. Page 1 must include the text 'Jeopardy', 'Fractions', 'Decimals', and 'Percentages'. Page 2 must contain a 3x3 grid of at least 9 rectangles, with category labels and point values '100', '200', and '300'. Page 3 must contain the text '3/4' (specifically 'What is 3/4 + 1/2?'). Page 4 must show the correct answer '5/4' or '1 1/4'.
